headline: A Look At LyondellBasell Industries (LYB) Valuation After Dividend Cut And Full Year Earnings Loss
summary: Dividend cut and earnings loss put income focus in the spotlight LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) has rattled income focused investors by cutting its quarterly dividend by $0.68 to $0.69 per share, alongside full year 2025 results that swung to a net loss. The company reported 2025 revenue of US$30.15b compared with US$33.39b a year earlier, and a net loss of US$745 million versus prior net income of US$1.36b, pushing earnings per share figures into loss territory. See our latest analysis...

headline: Iran Conflict Sends Oil Prices Higher. 2 Chemical Stocks to Keep an Eye On.
summary: Dow Inc. and LyondellBasell Industries could benefit from widening oil and natural-gas spreads as Iran-related turmoil lifts crude prices.
